findings.evidence: `rg -n "chafaiRescaled"` shows only `chafaiRescaled_eq_map`, `chafaiRescaled_apply`, and `chafaiRescaled_mass_eq` at lines 237-259; `finite_measure_cluster_limit` consumes `∀ g : BoundedContinuousFunction α ℝ, Tendsto (fun n => ∫ x, g x ∂(σ n)) ...` at `TauCeti/MeasureTheory/Measure/Prokhorov.lean:54`.
findings.fix: Add public characteristic integral lemmas, at least a `BoundedContinuousFunction`/Bochner-integral pushforward formula for `chafaiRescaled`, and preferably the specialized Laplace/Bernstein-kernel formula needed by the representation proof.
findings.issue: `chafaiRescaled` is only characterized by set preimages and total mass, but the downstream Prokhorov API consumes real integrals of bounded continuous test functions, so users must unfold the pushforward body to rewrite `∫ g ∂ chafaiRescaled f n`.

findings.evidence: The file’s public main declarations list `chafaiDensity`, `chafaiMeasure`, `bernstein_kernel`, `chafaiRescaled`, and `chafaiMeasure_finite_mass`, while `rg -n "integral_chafaiDensity_le_pred"` shows the lemma is only defined at line 311 and used internally at line 368.
findings.fix: Make this lemma `private` or move it behind a narrower internal namespace; keep the public surface at the finite-mass theorem and density/measure characterization lemmas.
findings.issue: `integral_chafaiDensity_le_pred` exposes an IBP step that is used only to prove `chafaiMeasure_finite_mass_of_tendsto`, not a characteristic operation needed by the roadmap theorem.

summary: The exposed measure API is not yet sufficient for the stated Bernstein-extraction consumer without unfolding implementation bodies. One proof-internal density estimate is also left public despite being subsumed by the mass theorem.
